title: Sev Buzk

{{Quote|Don't bother, ''Lieutenant Manech''—I'll deal with it. Let's see them try that 'embargo' garbage with ''me''.|Commander Sev Buzk to Lieutenant Manech|<ref name="OVK" />}}
'''Sev Buzk''' was the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the small [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Troska]]. He tricked the locals into thinking the Empire was on the verge of full scale occupation, enabling him to extort them. Doing so through a campaign of brute force and intimidation, Buzk was undone when his underling [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Treyz Manech|Manech]] hired [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to entrap the commander and expose his corrupt conduct.

==Biography==
===Instigator of chaos===
{{Quote|The only thing ''I'' know is to tell my ''TIE bomber'' where to find your ''house''!|Buzk threatening Torino Kyber|<ref name="OVK" />}}
[[File:Buzk3.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Buzk choking Manech upon discovering the hiring of Boba Fett]]
Nine [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]]<ref name="OVK" /> Sev<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|97|Buzk, Commander Sev}}</ref> Buzk was stationed on the remote [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Troska]] and was placed in charge of a small [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|troops]]. It was an ignoble post, considered a posting for dead-end careers. Buzk made the most of it by pushing around the locals through extortion rackets, encouraging [[Politics/Legends|political]] coups and enabling [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] rackets. He kept his men safe by using the ruse that the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] was close to fully occupying the planet.<ref name="OVK" />

This ruse did not work on the royal family of Troska, the [[Kyber Royal Family|Kybers]]—they fought back against Buzk's force and cut off the garrison's regular [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] supply from the [[Refinery/Legends|refineries]]. Buzk found [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Torino Kyber]] particularly annoying, causing three lock-outs in a month at [[Refinery Six-Two-Two|Torino's refinery]]. Buzk threatened the Kybers many times and, on more than one occasion, sent his interrogation squad to stop the lock-outs.<ref name="OVK" />

===Fall of an officer===
{{Quote|YOU…DID…WHAT?|Buzk passionately interrogates Manech over the issue of Boba Fett's involvement|<ref name="OVK" />}}
[[File:Buzk4.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Buzk is led away after being arrested.]]
In an attempt to stop the deadlock, Buzk's [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], [[Treyz Manech]], employed the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to deal with the Kybers. When Buzk found out, he nearly killed the lieutenant. However, he was interrupted by a transmission from [[King/Legends|King]] [[Natas Kyber|Natas]], head of the Kyber family. He accused Buzk of sending Boba Fett, who had just destroyed Torino's refinery. Buzk originally denied knowledge of the incident, blaming it on the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], but Natas then played a security [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of Fett saying that Buzk had sent him.<ref name="OVK" />

Buzk promptly ordered a huge contingent of troopers to attack the Kyber [[Troska palace|palace]], driving a [[Reconnaissance Troop Transporter|troop transport]] during the battle. The battle ended in his defeat, and Buzk was arrested by the Empire for his extortion of the Kybers. Despite his reputation as a model commander, Buzk's true nature was duly exposed by Manech, who had called in Boba Fett as part of his plan to end Buzk's abuse of the locals.<ref name="OVK" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Tell me why I shouldn't break your neck right here.|Buzk, after discovering Lieutenant Manech had employed Boba Fett to pacify the Kybers|<ref name="OVK" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] individual with pale [[Color/Legends|gray]] skin, bald pate and red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], Buzk was a very violent person who had brute power on top of his role as a commander, and he often treated his own men with the same violence as he would an enemy. Despite his ruthlessness and willingness to extort his enemies, he did try to hide these intentions by acting ignorant of events of which he had knowledge.<ref name="OVK" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sev Buzk first appeared in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]'', written by [[Jeremy Barlow|Thomas Andrews]] and drawn by [[Francisco Ruiz Velasco]].<ref name="OVK" /> ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], gave Buzk's first name as Sev.<ref name="CSWE" />
